title: Viral titration by the Plaque assay
author: Elen Mello de Souza
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jqxcmxn
materials: Maintain in RPMI 1640 medium (Cultilab) supplemented with 10% fetal bovine serum (Cultilab), 2 mM L-glutamine (Gibco) and 100U/50µg penicillin/streptomycin (Sigma-Aldrich) for 24 h at 37°C in a 5% CO2 incubator.
Count viral plaques for calculate plaque-forming unit (PFU).

steps.title: Seed Vero lineage cells (kidney epithelial...
steps.instruction: Seed Vero lineage cells (kidney epithelial cells from African green monkey) in 24- well plates at a density of 2 x 10 5 cells/ well.

steps.title: Prepare serial ten-fold dilutions of viral...
steps.instruction: Prepare serial ten-fold dilutions of viral suspension in sterile dilution tubes (10 -1 up to 10 -10 ).

steps.title: Label 24-well plate containing confluent Vero cell monolayers for inoculation
steps.instruction: Label 24-well plate containing confluent Vero cell monolayers for inoculation.

steps.title: Add 100 µl of the viral...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µl of the viral suspension without dilution into each of the two wells of 24-well plate.

steps.title: Add 100 µl of each serial...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µl of each serial dilution into each of the two wells of 24-well plate and maintain two wells without infection.

steps.title: Incubate the inoculated plate at 37°C...
steps.instruction: Incubate the inoculated plate at 37°C for 1 hour in a 5% CO2 incubator to allow for virus adsorption.

steps.title: Add 1 ml of 3% semi-solid...
steps.instruction: Add 1 ml of 3% semi-solid carboxymethyl cellulose (CMC) overlay medium to each well to limit the virus diffusion.

steps.title: Maintain the plate for seven days...
steps.instruction: Maintain the plate for seven days at 37°C in a 5% CO2 incubator.

steps.title: Incubate cell monolayer with 1 ml...
steps.instruction: Incubate cell monolayer with 1 ml of the 10% formol for a minimum 18 hours at room temperature for fixation.

steps.title: Remove the overlay medium and fixer
steps.instruction: Remove the overlay medium and fixer.

steps.title: Wash cell monolayer in running water (3 times)
steps.instruction: Wash cell monolayer in running water (3 times).

steps.title: Stain cell monolayer with 1 ml of the 0
steps.instruction: Stain cell monolayer with 1 ml of the 0.04% Violet crystal for 1 hour at room temperature.
